Name: GraphicsConfig_SSAOQuality_win64
Description: Determines the parameters of each screen space ambient occlusion quality level.

Fields.Name: Enable Screen-space Ambient Occulsion
Fields.Description: If ON, enable screen-space ambient occlusion.

Fields.Name: Enable SSAO Reprojection
Fields.Description: If reprojection is enabled, artifacts are hidden from undersampling, but ghosting may occur if reprojection fails.

Fields.Name: Enable Bilateral Upscaling
Fields.Description: Determines the bilateral upscaling settings for SSAO.

Fields.Name: Enable Normal Usage
Fields.Description: Determines the normal usage settings for SSAO.
